title: dryopteris lonchodes
intro: Dryopteris lonchodes, also known as the Japanese shield fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris lonchodes include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
